author: phase-4-coordinator
content: core-math-sys already ships lib/signgam.c with 'int signgam;' and compiles it into the static lib. The issue is that lgamma.c does '#include <math.h> // for signgam' which declares signgam on POSIX but not on Windows. The fix is to declare signgam as extern in a compat header and inject it via CFLAGS. But since core-math-sys is an upstream dep with its own build.rs, we can't modify its compilation. Instead, we need to add the compat header at the ferray-ufunc level using a build.rs that sets the CFLAGS env var before core-math-sys compiles.
